word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly.
word-counter.metaTitle: Word Counter - Free Online Word & Character Count Tool
word-counter.metaDescription: Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs instantly. Free online tool, no signup required. Works entirely in your browser.
word-counter.keywords: word counter, character count, text analysis, word count online
word-counter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

faq.q1: How does the word counter work?
faq.a1: Paste or type your text and get instant word, character, sentence, and paragraph counts. All processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded.
faq.a2: No, the tool processes text of any length directly in your browser with no limits.
faq.a3: Reading time is estimated at 200 words per minute, which is the average adult reading speed.

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.description: Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, and more.
case-converter.metaTitle: Case Converter - Free Online Text Case Changer
case-converter.metaDescription: Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, and more. Free online tool, no signup required.
case-converter.keywords: case converter, uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, snake_case
case-converter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...
case-converter.title: Title Case

faq.a1: We support UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE.
faq.q2: Can I convert code variable names?
faq.a2: Yes! Use camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, or kebab-case conversions for programming variable names.

lorem-ipsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum.description: Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words.
lorem-ipsum.metaTitle: Lorem Ipsum Generator - Free Placeholder Text Generator
lorem-ipsum.metaDescription: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words. Free online tool for designers and developers.
lorem-ipsum.keywords: lorem ipsum generator, placeholder text, dummy text, filler text
lorem-ipsum.startWithLorem: Start with "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..."

faq.a1: Lorem Ipsum is placeholder text commonly used in design and publishing to fill spaces where real content will eventually go.
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose to generate by paragraphs, sentences, or words, set the count, and optionally start with the classic Lorem Ipsum opening.
